description: Reformat the legal motion draft at /home/ga/Documents/motion_draft.docx to comply with California Superior Court filing rules (CRC Rule 2.108). The document must use Times New Roman 12pt font, double line spacing, a 1.5-inch left margin, and 1.0-inch top, bottom, and right margins. Enable continuous line numbering and add centered page numbers in the footer. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the major section headings: MEMORANDUM, STATEMENT OF FACTS, ARGUMENT, CONCLUSION, and DECLARATION. Save the compliant document as /home/ga/Documents/motion_formatted.docx without overwriting the original draft.
